# StealthEye Cloud

> No-local ChatGPT-native GitHub/browser execution-body agent.

## Start

- Instructions: `AGENTS.md`
- Active state: `STEALTHEYE_ACTIVE.md`
- Decisions: `STEALTHEYE_DECISIONS.md`
- Handoff: `STEALTHEYE_RELAY.md` and `STEALTHEYE_RELAY.json`
- Latest checkpoint: `STEALTHEYE_SEAL.json`
- Next action: `NEXT_ACTION.md`
- Repo map: `AGENT_REPO_MAP.md`

## Specs

- Final technical spec: `docs/StealthEye_Cloud_Final_Technical_Specification.md`
- Status addendum: `docs/TECHNICAL_SPEC_STATUS_ADDENDUM.md`
- Build plan: `docs/StealthEye_Cloud_Build_Plan.md`
- S9 spec: `docs/S9_ONE_DROP_BUILD_ACCELERATOR.md`
- S10 spec: `docs/S10_ASSISTANT_OPTIMIZATION_LAYER.md`
- S11 spec: `docs/S11_ONE_ACCEPT_MISSION_EXECUTOR.md`
- S11 report: `docs/S11_FINAL_REPORT.md`

## Current phase

S0–S11 are merged. No active implementation mission is open.

## Latest completed mission

S11 — One-Accept Mission Executor, merged through PR #21 at `da07e96c466f54086143a34422c47a60f6de1d2e`.

## S11 result

S11 built a real GitHub-native mission executor so one approved mission lease can complete routine repo/build/proof/repair/merge work without repeated operator confirmations.

## Important caveat

Direct post-merge truth commits are not proven unless a fresh proof run verifies the resulting main HEAD.

## Next action

Await the next operator-selected mission. Do not start S12 until the operator chooses it.

## Do not use

Do not create or rely on `CLAUDE.md`, `.github/copilot-instructions.md`, `.cursorrules`, `soul.md`, generic `MEMORY.md`, or generic `rules.md`.
